message:
feat(render-term): add sequence lifeline + activation bar rendering

Terminal renderer now draws sequence diagram structural elements:

1. Layout bands (dashed lifelines): vertical dashed lines at each
   participant's center, drawn with alternating dash/gap segments
   in the sub-cell canvas

2. Activation bars: rectangles on lifelines showing active processing
   periods, drawn using the LayoutActivationBar geometry from the
   layout extensions

Both render in the subcell canvas mode (Braille/Block/HalfBlock),
appearing between cluster backgrounds and edge paths in the z-order.

All three renderers (SVG, terminal, canvas) now render sequence
lifelines and activation bars consistently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
